LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF LITTLER MENDELSON, P.C.'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT - THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO AMEND TO NAME DUKE CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC IN PLACE OF DUKE CAPITAL PARTNERS, INC. THE COURT DENIES THE REMAINDER OF THE MOTION AS WITHDRAWN. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT S. BARTLETT OF BARTLETT, LEADER-PICONE & YOUNG LLP, TEL. NO. (510)444-2404 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. W. PATRICK KELLEY, TEL. NO. (650) 327-4366 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LITTLER MENDELSON, P.C.'S Motion To Amend Judgment - The motion is granted in part. Plaintiff has leave to amend to name Duke Capital Partners, LLC in place of Duke Capital Partners, Inc. The court denies the remainder of the motion as withdrawn. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Discharged
